channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 tamnd/kage (2742 ⭐)
item.description:

]]>

item.title: 🐹 Nigh/show-me-the-story (284 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Nigh

📝 Repository: Nigh/show-me-the-story

📄 Descrizione: Self-hosted AI novel generator: single Go binary + web UI. OpenAI-compatible API → outline → chapter-by-chapter writing with review, foreshadowing, fact-check, and full-book polish. Chinese & English.

⭐ Stelle: 284

🍴 Forks: 25

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: agent ai-writing creative-writing fiction-writing foreshadowing generative-ai go golang llm novel-generator openai-compatible self-hosted single-binary storytelling svelte web-novel writing-assistant

item.title: 🐹 MAX-API-Next/MAX-API (155 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: MAX-API-Next

📝 Repository: MAX-API-Next/MAX-API

📄 Descrizione: MAX API Next 社区是由来自科研机构和高校的 AGI 爱好者组织发起、维护和运营的研究驱动型技术社区，聚焦 AI Models 与 Agents 治理方向，致力于建设面向 AGI 应用时代的开放基础设施。社区关注多模型与多平台接入、国产模型持续适配、AgentOps 工程实践、成本审计、权限与安全边界、私有化部署和长期运营优化，目标是把模型服务、Agent 应用、用户组织和上游平台之间的共性治理问题沉淀为稳定、可复用、可持续演进的工程能力。

⭐ Stelle: 155

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T13:20:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-13T16:08:12Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Foxemsx

📝 Repository: Foxemsx/riptide

📄 Descrizione: A polished terminal internet speed test and realtime bandwidth monitor written in Go. Riptide measures download, upload, and latency in a centered card UI with live progress, compact sparklines, smooth animation, and clean cross-platform output for Linux and Windows terminals.

item.title: 🐹 huynxtb/office2pdf (110 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: huynxtb

📝 Repository: huynxtb/office2pdf

📄 Descrizione: Convert Office documents — Excel, Word, ODF, CSV, RTF — to PDF through a simple HTTP API backed by headless LibreOffice. Features API-key authentication, configurable conversion concurrency and timeouts, upload size limits, and per-request isolation with automatic cleanup of temporary files.

⭐ Stelle: 110

🍴 Forks: 60

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: csv-to-pdf docx-to-pdf excel-to-pdf golang office-to-pdf word-to-pdf

📜 Licenza: MIT License

Visita il Repository su GitHub

item.description:
👤 Owner: kdsuomi

📝 Repository: kdsuomi/cc-simplerouter

📄 Descrizione: Install and setup in 26 seconds. Simplerouter configures Claude Code to use any compatible OpenRouter model in seconds, WITHOUT manual editing of config files, environment variables, or messing with local webservers/webUIs. It also doesn't overwrite your existing Claude Code subscription sign-in!
